title: Quantum Tech Beats Russian Satellite Jamming in New Arms Race
why:
- Quantum technology is being deployed as an alternative to GPS to overcome increased jamming of GPS satellite signals.
- Quantum sensors and supporting software developed by Q-CTRL will be commercially deployed later this year and are already under contract with the U.S. government.
- Quantum sensors based on Earth's magnetic field and gravity cannot be jammed or spoofed and do not rely on satellites, making them a robust backup for navigation.
- The U.S. government, Lockheed Martin, the Defense Innovation Unit, DARPA, Airbus, and the Royal Australian Navy are all working with Q-CTRL on quantum navigation and sensing systems.
- Quantum technologies are also emerging as important tools for battlefield information management and logistics optimization.
